response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior/staff full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) and entrepreneurial founder background via GISCollective. However, the role demands a Director-level IC with 15 years of experience and recognized AI expertise; candidate has roughly 14-16 years but lacks demonstrated AI/ML platform leadership, cloud-scale architecture credentials, or advanced AI degrees. Recent AI-agent/MCP work is nascent and not at the principal/director scope required.
strengths: Polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput microservices
Founder of open-source GIS platform demonstrates entrepreneurial drive and product ownership
Active engagement in developer community via workshops, talks, and TDD/craftsmanship advocacy
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or recognized expertise at principal level
Career trajectory is senior IC, not Director-level technical leadership or strategy advisory
Limited cloud-scale architecture credentials beyond AWS CDK usage at one role

key_factors.factor: Seniority gap vs Director-level IC scope
